user_initial_prompt: build a backend for online bakery shop
tech_stack_summary: Web Development → Backend → REST → Python → FastAPI → Uvicorn

Core Application & Web Stacks -> Web Dev.rationale: web development is essential for building a backend for an online bakery shop.
Core Application & Web Stacks -> Web Dev.purpose: to provide the necessary functionality and interface for an online bakery shop.

Backend -> REST.purpose: API design for the bakery shop

REST -> Python.rationale: Python has extensive libraries for handling APIs and can be easily integrated with web frameworks like Flask or Django.
REST -> Python.purpose: To build a RESTful API backend efficiently.

Python -> FastAPI.rationale: FastAPI is modern and has a fast development cycle.
Python -> FastAPI.purpose: To build a backend with high performance and ease of use.
